title: Lead Instructional Designer at Skill India Mission Partners

jsonLd.title: Lead Instructional Designer at Skill India Mission Partners
jsonLd.description:
Join the Skill India Mission Partners family as a Instructional Designer in Chennai. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Skill India Mission Partners:
Skill India Mission Partners is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Support students with special educational needs
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Mentoring

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Flexible working hours
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Chennai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Skill India Mission Partners!
